title: Learning Checks
description: Starter tests you can replace with your own JSON file.

tests.title: Web Fundamentals
tests.instructions: Answer from memory. Use examples when they help.

questions.prompt: What problem does semantic HTML solve?
Which CSS layout tool is best for two-dimensional page layouts?
Explain the difference between synchronous and asynchronous JavaScript.
What does staging a file mean in Git?
Describe a safe workflow for reviewing changes before committing.
